title: Gluten-Free Clamato Braised Beef
description: A hearty, gluten-free beef stew made with Clamato and braised to perfection.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef chuck roast until browned on all sides, then remove and set aside.
Add the onion, garlic, carrot, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the Clamato, tomato paste, beef broth, salt, and pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Transfer the pot to the oven and braise the beef for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and let the beef rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve the beef with the braising liquid spooned over the top.
